command: docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -c "ALTER DATABASE template1 REFRESH COLLATION VERSION;" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -c "CREATE DATABASE vector_memory TEMPLATE template0;" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS embeddings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT NOT NULL, embedding vector(1536), layer TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general', metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_layer ON embeddings (layer);" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_created ON embeddings (created_at);" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "SELECT extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='vector';" 2>&1 && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "\dt" 2>&1 && echo DONE
intent: Fix template1 collation + create vector_memory DB via template0
